name: lotti
desc: Open-source private logbook with a local agentic layer. Long-living AI agents read what you record and propose what to do next. Hardware permitting, the models…
descFull: Open-source private logbook with a local agentic layer. Long-living AI agents read what you record and propose what to do next. Hardware permitting, the models runs locally too. Matrix + Vodozemac for end-to-end encrypted sync between your own devices.
